message:
test(conformance): expand round 7 — cluster, hyperloglog, function, scan, sort (2666 cases)

New test cases: CLUSTER KEYSLOT edge cases (nested/unclosed hash tags),
PFADD/PFCOUNT/PFMERGE multi-source unions and WRONGTYPE variants,
FCALL/FCALL_RO arity/numkeys validation, FUNCTION subcommand arity,
HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN COUNT and MATCH+COUNT combos, invalid scan options,
SORT LIMIT edge cases (negative/non-integer), SORT_RO DESC/nosort/GET.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
